ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compounds" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "compound_name" TEXT /* Name of the compound */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the compound */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the compound (e.g., Internal Standard, Analyte) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compound */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* CAS number of the compound */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound */,
  "purity" TEXT /* Purity level of the compound */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions required for the compound */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the compound */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number from the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "batch_name" TEXT /* Name of the batch */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the batch was analyzed */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method used for analysis */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who conducted the analysis */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the batch belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the analysis was conducted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batches_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batches_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument used for the analysis */,
  "method_version" TEXT /* Version of the method */,
  "method_reference" TEXT /* Reference or source of the method */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the method */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the method was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the method */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the operator (e.g., Analyst, Supervisor) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the operator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the operator belongs to */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch the sample belongs to */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of the sample (e.g., Standard, Unknown) */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the sample */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the sample */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sample (e.g., lab, external) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample expires */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the result belongs to */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound analyzed */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the analysis file */,
  "retention_time" REAL /* Retention time of the compound */,
  "area" REAL /* Peak area of the compound */,
  "theoretical_amount" REAL /* Theoretical amount of the compound */,
  "response_ratio" REAL /* Response ratio of the compound */,
  "istd_response" REAL /* Internal standard response of the compound */,
  "flag_details" TEXT /* Details of any flags or issues (e.g., out-of-bounds peak area, retention time) */,
  "concentration_measured" REAL /* Concentration of the compound measured in the sample */,
  "qc_status" TEXT /* Quality control status of the result (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the result */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis result the flag is associated with */,
  "flag_type" TEXT /* Type of the flag (e.g., Out-of-Bounds, Retention Time Issue) */,
  "flag_description" TEXT /* Description of the flag */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the flag */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the flag was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flags_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES analysis_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flags_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qc_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each QC report */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* Filename of the report */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the report (e.g., Approved, Rejected) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report is for */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the report */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was reviewed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qc_reports_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qc_reports_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Analyst, Supervisor, Manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the user */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the result */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis result being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES analysis_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "method_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method parameter */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the parameter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the parameter */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_method_parameters_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_method_parameters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_method_parameters_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_curves" (
  "curve_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration curve */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the curve is for */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method the curve is used with */,
  "curve_file" TEXT /* Filename of the calibration curve */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Date the curve is valid from */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* Date the curve is valid to */,
  "curve_description" TEXT /* Description of the calibration curve */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the curve */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the curve was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the curve */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the curve was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("curve_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_curves_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_curves_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_curves_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_curves_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
